title: 2026-06-19 Shino Birthday DJ Night
summary: Six-image Shino birthday Friday night character day album, from lab exit to a small warehouse DJ lounge, quiet coworker surprise, short set, summer travel notes, rain-cleared old town detour, and late-night room afterglow.
summaryJa: 架空の港町のアルバム。構成は仕事場、飲食店、音楽の場、街歩き。

images.alt: Shino leaving a fictional coastal product testing lab after an EMC retest on Friday 2026-06-19 evening, wearing a white blouse, terracotta cardigan, graphite trousers, lab ID, and black tote with fish charm as lavender DJ-night clothes peek from the bag
images.title: 01 0619 Lab to DJ lounge
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / office / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino in a small harbor warehouse bar on her quiet birthday night, wearing a black satin camisole, lavender sheer shirt, and ivory trousers while a close coworker arrives with a tiny drink and jellyfish charm gift
images.title: 02 0619 Coworker birthday drink
images.tags: Digital Painting / Fictional Port City / lounge / Shino 25
images.locationDetail: small harbor warehouse bar on her quiet birthday night

images.alt: Shino quietly playing a short DJ set in a small warehouse lounge under blue-violet light, focused on mixer knobs and headphones rather than posing, with paper flyers and a fish charm near the booth
images.title: 03 0619 Short DJ set blueviolet
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / club / Shino 25
images.locationDetail: small warehouse lounge under blue-violet light, focused on mixer knobs and headphones rather…

images.alt: Shino sitting in a quiet lounge corner after her DJ set, writing summer travel ideas on the back of a flyer beside headphones, a small drink, candlelight, and a fish charm
images.title: 04 0619 Flyer summer travel notes
images.tags: Digital Painting / Fictional Port City / lounge / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino walking through a rain-cleared old town after the DJ lounge, slightly lost but quietly pleased, holding an umbrella and folded flyer while wearing a burgundy-black satin top, lavender sheer shirt, ivory trousers, and slim sandals
images.title: 05 0619 Rain old town lost
images.tags: Soft Anime / Fictional Port City / street / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino late at night in her old merchant-house apartment, tired and quietly content beside a fish guide, measurement notebook, DJ flyer, black headphones, tiny birthday gift, coffee cup, and final tram lights outside
images.title: 06 0619 Late room bass afterglow
images.tags: Digital Painting / Fictional Port City / home / Shino 25
images.locationDetail: night in her old merchant-house apartment, tired and quietly content beside a fish guide
